star_1.text: Edit for 11-15-24 Wow, how did this games ad system go so wrong? When an advertisement pops up, I can't click out of the screen at all. I have to exit the game and close it just to keep playing. This goes for the free gifts ads as well and I don't even get the free gift. Graphics are great. Game play is easy to impossible. Sound good. Leveling up at the last 3/4 is expensive but gives you a chance to get better and change the difficulty levels which gives you mo $$

What used to be a fun top down shooter has become a boring point collecting rinse and repeat. Gathering stars just to get guns that were available when the game first came out is absurd. You're stuck with a single shot for the first couple hours into you get enough stars. On top of that, you have to wait for them to be "installed" unless you spend more stars for immediate install. Not worth my time anymore.

i was playing this game on my smart tv, unfortunately i have purchased pro version and i have paid the amount few days ago, the amount was deducted from my account but still i didn't det the pro version, i have still only two stages to play..
Good but! I have the paid version which is now starting to play adds!! Why is this?

Made a few purchases when I got this app and seems recently to have erased all game data including upgrades. Progress and money spent gone...would not redeem through game either. 6/17/23 Edit: second time now that my account was reset and the restore purchases did not work. You guys need to fix this...how is this still happening?

This game needs to decide if it wants to be Raptor: Call of the Shadows or 1943/Raiden. Because right now it's trying to be both and getting the hardest aspects of each. You die as fast as if it was 1943 but upgrade like in Raptor, and those don't work well together. It may look pretty, but all but the most dedicated masochists are advised to steer clear.

No other way to describe it except this game sucks. Has good potential, but a purely pay to play game, users will lose interest, like me, very quickly. The game is is frustrating having to play same stages repeatedly to achieve a specific goal. Bullets hidden under stars affecting your health, invisible bullets is ridiculous, no spawn option, rewards compared to grinding too low. Would not recommend this game to anyone, as well as uninstalling game from my device. Half a star rating from me👎

After 20 years, this is not that game. annoying ads, even with several purchased items, still feel too hard to play. Purchased upgrade not effective. Total lose of money and time. Its absolutely rubbish that even after purchase items, it feels still hard and still wants you to spends more bucks for clear the stage with ease. Else its time consuming as stage getting difficult and purchased item not helpful anymore. it mean at the end lose of money and time. Guys please bring back old developer.

Awesome game, but incessant ads after every death, level completion, cutscene, etc, even while my phone is in airplane mode. Every ad breaks the game audio and i must restart to get the audio back on. Fix this issue and lessen the amount of ads, like it used to be a few years back, and it would get a 5 star review from me

This game could be one of the best. As well as Sky Force Reloaded. However, progress is too slow. Playing the same levels over and over to progress is boring as hell. From what I can see, there are only like 10 levels? Upgrades are slow and take time to install. The game is fun, but there's other shoot em games that are far better. This one wins in the graphics department, but that's it.

Purchased ad removal on a device, got a new phone, installed the game, i clicked on restore purchase and it says nothing to restore. WTH. most of the game settings transferred, levels and such, but the annoying adds are back. And seriously wth, i have to watch a 30 second commerical after every game. And the restore purchase button is useless. They just put it there to pretend like they care. It doesn't do anything. Update- your customer service sucks, they are as useful as the restore button.

Used to be decent, now it's turned into another game chuck full of adds you can't get out of, constantly interrupting your play... uninstalling, i understand the desire to gain the few cents that get paid to the developer for each ad watched, but i have no desire or need to forcefully watch reapeat adds every 15 seconds. Good luck!

Hey, my review just disappeared, why? You've put ads after every stage and even though it says I will lose a reward if I close the video early, but I don't get any even if I let the video play out. Looks like someone else is getting the rewards. The scrolling studders after the last update which doesn't help when you're trying to avoid things on the screen.

Been playing since it came out. And I mean from way back when it was a Symbian game in the 00's. Just installed the latest update and now it won't restore previous purchases and saved game data. It says it has but it doesn't. Really don't want to go through all that grind again. Didnt ever have that problem before on any previous phone. And where has my purchase from 2018 for ad removal disappeared to? Vanished from my play store history!!!! That's bs!!!!!!!!

Addictive. I like the gradual upgrades and the ability to go back and replay levels. The controls take getting used to, but they're fine once you get it. Some upgrades are not completely intuitive, but that could be because they're low level for me still. Also some buttons are unclear; still don't know what some things do. (Edit:Oct'20 no longer seems to function with my device. Can't get past initial loading screen - reduced to 1star from 5).

Graphics is good. But what I don't like is the controls. Wherever you put your finger, your plane follows it. So your plane is under your finger. Your finger blocks your plane and you can't see it which makes you die easier. Try playing some similar games like this and you'll see what to fix about your controls. Try 1945. Controls are good.

Good graphics but only a waste of time. The game is a dead end. I wasted some weeks before I realized the maximum upgrade for each feature is lvl 3 and that is not really enough for its difficult levels. And there are like 10 different missions that you have to do over and over so it gets boring after a short time

Was playing fine for a month now the game keeps crashing on me at boss on 1st stage. Unable to get past 1st stage. Was on level 9. Game all sudden wouldnt load. Uninstall and reinstall i lost all progress and now game crashes. What is going on. Damn Was a kickass game. Not anymore...

I love the game. The graphics is so surreal and very entertaining. But why does it have to be so hard in every level. I'm a casual gamer and just love hitting the mission objectives. Don't you have some sort of difficulty level gamers can choose at the start?

Google play is cheater. I tried to unlock the full version of this game on Android TV. Although money got deducted yet game didn't get unlocked. When I requested for refund I got reply from Google support team that the purchase doesn't meet their policy so I won't get any refund. I made the purchase in Google Play Store. Don't make any purchase related to this game.

star_2.text: starts off fun but the more you play the more you can tell the devs gave zero thought about players enjoyment. for one why is there a limit to how many times you can play. isn't the point to get players to keep playing the game why would you add a feature that actively forces players to stop playing just doesn't make much sense to me. second I'm at stage five right now it seems impossible to beat and I missed the instructions at the beginning now they won't repeat so I have no way to process.

A shadow of it's formal self. I'd bought the original game, and played it to death, recommended it to everyone. Bought it again on Xbox. Now, a couple of phones later, this version is just a IAP nightmare. The game is about grinding, but an ad after EVERY round? It's always the same with these greedy developers - hide behind time-locked content and ads, and annoy people enough to pay.

A lot of improvements are required for this game. 1. There is no daily login rewards. 2. There is no weekly rewards. 3. Upgrades are very expensive. 4. There is no rewards for immediate upgrades. I am playing this game since many months and my upgrades are only in stage 3. For the stage 10 upgrades You want me play this game until I turn 60 years old. TIME IS MONEY. YOU NEED TO WORK ON THIS.

Like so many games, lots of potential wasted by greed. Ads AND microtransactions (seriously, pick one) & expensive upgrades compared to how much you earn combined with big jumps in difficulty between levels means doing a level over & over ad nauseam to afford upgrades to be strong enough to move on. Giving up after 100%ing first few levels, since I have better things to do with my time. I just wanted to play a fun & challenging game, not waste hours grinding. Permissions also concerning.

Fun in some ways but there were a few things that were annoying enough to be a deal breaker: the screen brightness/dims every time you lift your finger and my eyes get too sore to play. Also the difficulty ramps up way too fast for how long it takes too earn the upgraded needed to keep up. You'd need to spend several hours playing (and losing) just collecting stars that aren't worth enough and it starts to drag and get tedious. Stars clutter up the screen and make it hard to see enemy fire.

I love this game on Playstation. Playing with a touchscreen is so difficult and is my main complaint. Touching the screen causes a lot of things to go unseen. I tried bluetooth connecting a PS5 controller, but sadly it doesn't work.

The game is fun in the first few times you play it Then comes the insufferable grind that halts your progress completly. The impossibly boring levels where you cant shoot and the waiting for upgrades. On top of that you are forced an to watch advertisements between levels of which they are just 9 but you'll spend most of your time replaying the same one just to get enough stars to upgrade anything This game only reminds me of how good we had it when Air Strike 3D and Star Defender were alive.

I like every thing about this game. the graphics, the design but the thing is this game is very hard. I can't beat level four because it's very hard and i get surrounded by many enemies which are very strong. I have tried many times but i can't beat it. I haven't tried the pc version but i can't beat it on mobile.

Too much grinding. The Symbian version still better than this one. Also the most ridiculous thing is, you only can play for X times per day and the weapon upgrades are too slow. They even make ship production slower after higher upgrades. Hey I know this is intended to make the users not quickly uninstall the game because of bored with it. But this is worse than same-as-usual gameplay like the Symbian version. At first, I almost spend my money to show my appreciation. But I disappointed now

hi. i just downloaded the app. i played yhis game and there was some progress i achieved. i logged in with my Google account, which i used the last time i played. the trouble is that I've lost all the upgrades i made to my vessel, but the levels are unlocked as i left them the last time. i need help, i cannot recover the ship upgrades and it's almost impossible to play hard mlde with a lvl1 ship. thanks

This has one of the worst maneuverability. My finger is blocking my plane and i cant see the incoming bullets near it. And please put in the setting that will enable us to adjust sensitivity so we can make movements smoother and easier. Think about it

It takes forever to accumulate enough in game currency to buy meaningful upgrades. The limit on lives / energy makes this even more cumbersome. Unless you are happy to watch ads or spend money, look elsewhere from some Retro-Style shooter.

Good graphics . However, this is the 1st time I've seen a shooter game that expects you to keep doing the same level many many times in order to progress to the next level. No I'm not talking about ability to play well, but collecting one star at a time and you need thousands.

I want to give this game 5 stars, it was fun grinding to the near end. But then my phone broke, got a new one but there's no way to restore old game as doesn't save to your profile cloud. All that progress gone. It's not worth the effort even if I wanted to. Ps Yes I did log in with the same account

Never mind the stars...this is the only game i actually played,right from my Nokia7610..then on all my N series devices.I'd decided to play the game first,then do the review,but i played a couple of stages and now the game is not progressing to stage 3,ive completed stages 1 and 2 and i find myself precariously having to watch an ad to gain access to a plane.The original Symbian version IS the best.Developers you have screwed up..BIG TIME! fix it ASAP!

It's an exciting shooting game but the design was too tough at madness level even with all the upgrades been made, i can't even pass through level 9 after playing for few months. The designer should give an extra upgrade of fire power to the Player to make this game more approachable.

This game is harder than the reloaded, card is harder to get, and enemies are too durable, my maxed out canon need a lot time to destroy the enemies regular aircraft, and there is no restart button when the mission fails. Cmon....

I love this game, but on my Xbox. There should be a way to link my account to that one, transfer my progress, medals, achievements etc. Plus, the fact that I have already bought it, so it should be ad-free. It is absurd to be asked to pay for the same game again.

game and graphics are great! but the touch sensitivity is too lacking. for me its too slow, it cant keep up with my fingers. lol. (or perhaps one should upgrade ones thrusters for better evasion? too bad there's no thrusters updgrade! ftw) i wish one could adjust it to his/her own sensitivity preference.

The game is kind of nice but is buried beneath a highly annoying ads, timers, timed-bound number of plays. This is just so infuriating. Reinstalled only to leave this heartfelt review. The non reloaded version is so much enjoyable.

star_3.text: This is so close to being a 5 star experience. But there are two major design choices which I find very perplexing. The first big one is no matter how many times I collect cards(As RARE as that already is) I always seem to get repeats! ...and I only have three cards. That's a bad sign. That gives the player less and less desire to keep playing. The second one, and it's virtually as big, is the grind. I don't mind a good grind to leveling up to add to the lasting value. But this is overkill.

The only problem (which is a big problem) with this game is that with ads on, you run out of 10 tries, watch a minute of an ad for each life after that until you put the game down. But I bought the ad free version in game and I still run out of level runs but now I don't have ads to give me more tries.. I just have to close the app and let time pass for the lives to come back. Not good if you're trying to complete a task. Devs.. don't put things in that make us close the app and come back later.

It's ok, but, being an utter grind fest, leaves me feeling frustrated. I paid for the 'double reward' up grade. If you don't it will take you forever to get anywhere. Even with the upgrade it is still way too much effort for so little reward! 3 stars, good graphics, great idea, and a more interesting time waster. But to get your plane to a decent level is going to take hours and hours of gameplay - who has the time?!

The original game used to be so fun.. the story.. the weapons upgrade.. now.. you've to keep repeating the same stage to upgrade the weapons required to clear the stages.. this is just annoying.. the game is much more difficult to clear without having to upgrade.. bring back the original version setup of the game please into this version..

Not exactly "pay to win" , but more "pay to have fun". You have to spend stars to upgrade your ship and to play the levels (unless you want to wait for several minutes). You end up grinding the same level over and over again to get a meager reward needed to progress. It's a shame since it's a good looking game with a potentially good gameplay. It's several years old and it kind of shows.

I'm pretty sure most 5 star reviews for this game are by people who played it for 15 mins only. I've progressed to the very last level, mastered most levels on all difficulties but the last boss (spider one) is just way too gimmicky. Every cheap arcade shooter trick is used in that fight it just seems like a blatant attempt to make the game pointlessly hard and thus encourage me to buy stars...5000 stars btw late game is spare change so thats not gonna happen. The games stigma is the blatant p2w

Good but annoying because say you buy with real money the stars, when you upgrade and add the bottom 3 in plane upgrades, you find out after that you need more stars to use them and when you buy with stars the upgrades, if you die you lose the upgrades. Then you can't just play through the levels, because it forces you to make sure you are getting at least 3 unlocks per level like including kill all enemies and no damage at all to progress to other levels. Waste of money, i should've waited.

Its bring back so many memories, the time im using Nokia N'gage back in 2004. This version graphics improved significantly. However, the sound was moving backward. Especially the explosion sound. The sound for old version was sharper & make you feel like a 3D explosion sound. But now this new version's sound more like mono, not as good as old version.

Love the game.. but.. sadly.. I realize that the version I install is not the latest version (reloaded) purchased the double star as well as no ads + quick progress only to realize this is not the version where you can get different planes and cards! :( Seems like I might have wasted the $7.95 and have to repurchase the same perks for the reloaded version. :(

It's a beautiful and fun game; one of the most graphically pleasing of its kind. Unfortunately, the power curve is so steep, you have to play each level 50+ times to become strong enough to advance to the next. After 100's of games, I still haven't powered up enough to handle stage 4. Lazy game design.

After all these years still one of the better top down shooters out there, very smooth and polished. Unfortunately it also has obnoxious mobile game mechanics where you can only play X amount of times per hour and is bloated with ads. This could have easily been a 5 star recommendation.

Nice revamp of old game BUT "UN-NECESSARILY GRINDY". Design and graphic r fine, controls r little wonky bt you get used to it aftr few minutes, chk & toggle suitable gesture control optns in the game setng too. Game his hard as heck and controls are not so smooth, so earning stars to upgrade the plane is very very difficult. U can grab few free stars by watchng ad but then it has CD of frkng 3 hrs. They did it jst to promote ingame purchase. Fix the grindiness & remove cap on ad CD, 5 star then.

Liked the take on the scrolling shooter but completion of a mission fully is hard and upgrades are slow initially. The firepower is too less for any kind of enemies during start except for normal ones which go out in a single bullet others are tough to handle initially. Unless you are dedicated this game will be a bit hard. For a perfectionist, this game will consume their time like anything...

Developers, it was very heart breaking that you made the game so long, feels like endless. Upade for cannons and missiles etc seems to be endless moreover the requirements to win each stage are so high to be met. Requirement of stars for each upgradation is way too high, than what can ve collected in each match. The most irritating was they way you guys had set the objective, 100% kills, seriously and that also you made necessary to win. I uninstalled the game after 4th stage.

Entertaining none of the less, I like shooting games and flying, unfortunately the sound only lasts til I die when opening the app then nothing til I close the app then reopen after bout 5 mins and repeat each time I die/crash, and then on lvl 5 I don't have the option to use shield, bomb nor laser to progress in lvl. Overall nice entertainment when bored, with sound and access to weapons could be way better experience.

Good game, but....I am stuck on stage 5. Been stuck here for days. I don't mind a difficult game. But after several days of being stuck on stage 5, I am going to delete the game. It's a shame, I really like it. A game should not be frustrating or stacked against you to the point where it becomes frustrating. I hate that, no one wants to become frustrated while playing a game. Games are supposed to be fun. I am no longer having fun. sorry but I'll be deleting it.

well actually I have played "sky force reloaded" in a different platform (Nokia N70" it had good game n SFX effects but that was way back in 2011 and I loved it.. I was honestly happy to come across this.. problem is its the 3rd time am downloading it and the progress percentage would stop/$tuck exactly at 81°/. I have a enough free space, a good network ... cost me free data lost... still three stars for the "once I played"

This game is great with great graphic but level 8 and 9 is too hard. My Warplane is max but I can't complete missions in these levels. I passed all levels but achievements didn't achieved. I think it has a bug

Changed my rating from 5 to 3 because of the latest update, which made the ads more aggressive and demands your cookies consent, without which you're losing the chance to get ad-related bonuses (double points etc.)
It's a wonderful game. I just got one problem, I paid for ad free and still receiving ads. I have also contacted customer service and still no response. If they fix it I'll edit my review.

star_4.text: While lacking the depth that Sky Force Reloaded provides, Sky Force 2014 is still a great game. The key to its replayability is its upgrade system, allowing you to focus on specific types of weapons as part of your playstyle, and the different difficulty settings for each mission. However, if slowly transforming your plane from a flying BB gun into a juggernaut doesn't sound fun in and of itself, you may find it tedious since you will be replaying the same 10 missions over and over.

Sadly, you added an update where if you died, you would have to watch a forced ad. Please still make the game a freemium model. As a person who has maximum upgrades, all the cards, completed all the levels without any purchases, I am now playing this game to kill time. Please, remove this ad feature or even decrease the times this happens to me. Deducted to 4 stars.
overall enjoyed the game; would rate higher if the invisible red planes with collision at the start of level 3 were removed

Ads are not intrusive. Difficulty level shot up from level 3 even on Normal mode, can't progress without upgrades, which makes the game very grindy and game progression slow. Graphic is nice. Control is easy but sometimes the aircraft gets stuck in place for ~1 second, which is fatal on harder levels (instant death). Otherwise it's good game, suitable for sporadic, short-time fun.

This is an exceptional shmup with crisp sound effects, great graphics, and a satisfying upgrade system. However, due to how they want you to buy stars the progression is so painfully slow that it is an absolute slog to keep playing. I understand trying to motivate people to spend money in a free to play game but you really can't play for very long without paying unless you want to hunker down for an extremely slow experience. Do yourself a favour and play the pc or console version of the game.

The gameplay is excellent. Just like the original. Takes alot of grinding to work up the levels but you don't need to spend to do so which is refreshing. The only thing to dent a 5 star rating is that there is a serious bug in the achievements which means I have earned them all without actually earning them. It doesn't affect the gameplay itself though

Pay Or Grind. Yea the graphics and gameplay are good. Really though there isn't much content but there is a LOT of grinding. PoG games kill time but I didn't sign up to work to have fun. Not installing the next game Reloaded cause it's the same thing, PoG. Developer note: All systems upgraded to L3+, you're welcome for the ad money.

The game itself is decent. One of the best shmups on Android. There is a grinding element but I don't find it that annoying - more like challenging. With enough skill after a few initial upgrades you can get relatively far on your own so no purchasing really necessary for me. There is one issue though - the controls of the game. You can't activate your powerups "mid-flight". In order to fire laser/shield/bomb you have to lift your finger which means you have to stop. It killed me many times.

This game is a fun bullet hell game where both you and the enemy fire upon each other what I like about this game is that it is a pass time for when your bored never gets boring but never gets past the pass time rating. The controls are simple hold and drag you destroy the enemy collect stars(the games currency) and spend it on upgrades to the plane the only down side is that the size and damage of the bullets when you just start off is harsh boat it up a little please...

Pretty good experience with the game, i guess they have put everything on the right spot but the game needs some optimization like the plane control with the fingers must be snappy & fast while taking it right to left or so and the colours option must be there for the planes., although killing 100% enemy is abit tough task to deal with 😁 Thanks :)

The game is awesome as it should be. But I am addressing a problem. Whenever I close an advertisement and return to the game the sound system completely turns off. I have to restart the game to get the sounds of the game again. Please fix this as it is very annoying.

While the graphics is the GREATEST I have seen since video games came out for small screens!!! I am truly disappointed that in the First version of "Sky Force" it takes so long to upgrade your ship!! as well as you are not allowed 4 missles on the ship! nor when you pick-up extra hearts, those are not used First! before your ship starts taking damage! Otherwise each level is Amazing and challengling!! for the BEST Off-Line!! Experience I have had with a Flying FPS game!! being one of the seemingl

Excellent plane shooting game. Just 1 ad after each play, which is good because each stage has decent play time duration. Player gets to progress with each stage beat and stars collected to upgrade plane. Down side is that there is no game backup available, so progress will be lost if changing phone.

Sky force is a really fun game with great graphics and challenging levels that are super satisfying to complete. The reason I didn't put it for five stars though is because with the levels, I think it would be better if once u complete a level then u unlock the next level instead of having to get enough stars for it. But apart from that I love the game 👍

it is agood game really challenging, but like others have mentioned the time inbetween is long. I have a problem with using the stars for upgraded armaments that do not get specifically the wing guns and the laser. just as a sugestion i would show more ads likw after every play, and let people play after each ad or set of ads.

A great top down shooter! Very addicting and the graphics are amazing! It does get grindy and the wait times for upgrades are a bit annoying, but overall it's a great game. Perhaps a new line of levels would be appropriate? Keep it up!

Brilliant. Most fun I've had in a game for ages, it's not a pay to win thing, yes it's a bit slow to start on the first level, but the story is new, and it's just tremendous fun. The only reason I'm giving it 4 stars is because of the fact that you need medals to advance to the next level, it's alright on the first one, but when you get to level 10, that's pushing it a bit.

Love this game!! Lately though after finishing a level the sound goes away and doesn't work. I have to reboot , close the game completely to start over with sound but then happens again. This never was a problem. Is it the game? Using tablet S7

Best game every of this time. High definition and realistic graphics and animation. Sound effects are cool and I love the music. It's just that they should add more levels and planes would have given 5 stars

Great game - graphics and game play. It's Amazing! However I have a new phone and can't seem to sync my progress to the new phone. I really don't want to start again. If this is fixed and it's possible to sync across multiple devices, then I'll give 5 stars without hesitation

star_5.text: One of my favorite games of all time, along with its sequel "Reloaded". It's not pay to win, but to avoid grinding, it's totally worth it to pay for double stars, no ads, and buy yourself about 20,000 stars right at the beginning. After that, then the game is a lot better. This game's is better than most paid apps. I'd pay $5 for the game. But it's basically a "paid quality" game that allows you to play it for free with ads. I look at buying those 3 options as just buying the game.

If you like 1942, then you'll like this game. 5-second ads pop out between games and if you'd like to double your stars (in-game currency) after you lose a life, you can watch a 30-second ad. 8 quarters is all it takes to buy the Ads Removal option and improve your gaming experience. This gets you the most bang for your 2 bucks as it gets rid of the ads, gives unlimited lives, allows you to collect free stars every 3 hours, and doubles your stars with a tap of a button (after losing a life).
fantastic, same experience and quality as the old days... respect to be one of the few products who kept their originality, quality and uniqueness and didn't become disgustingly commercial....

I liked everything about this game. I have never thought to apply a slow-down feature for when the finger is taken off the screen. I was surprised I'd never implimented that in any of my own games software. The SFX, GFX, and gameplay were all great. The voice work was cute. Nice girl. Gonna play it quite a bit. Nice to find I increased my skill the more I play and could also find it challenging the first few times. Good colour code with powerups and lasers, keeping them starkly different.

There is no mobile game I enjoyed more than Sky Force reloaded. And I have never before spent so much money purchasing upgrade as I did here. I would not have regretted it, should it have actually restored my purchases. And now that i have to start the game all over, with a small red ship, the game had lost appeal for me. If there is something that can be done, I'm all ears. Other wise... what a waste and pity.

Just one complain. It's the laser. In mobile, when you lift your finger to use them. The ship sometimes just stay still and won't move and it made me have to use shield as well but it's a waste. When you got no shield to use then die is the most possible outcome. Most people complain about the game's difficulty and card distribution but I don't mind. People always complain about game being hard and they would also complain when the game is too easy. Don't mind them.

The classic plane shoot em up game, remastered! Now there's so much detail and immersion. The thrill is real, especially from stage 7+. I recommend buying the no ads to reduce stress. Try it for a week before buying. If you've finished and defeated boss of stage 9, then you can try the sequel: Sky Force Reloaded.

Such an amazing game. Nice Visuals and graphics. smooth controls. The mechanics are amazing. Such a feel in this game. Earlier I pointed out that the game felt repetitive and the cards were repetitive but at that time I didn't know it was designed to be like that but now it feels amazing to play.

Literally the game of my childhood, back when the game is too good for me. I had to come back to see if theres like part 3 since I have played relaoded then decided to download the first part of the game. I hope you guys are developing Sky force 3 or maybe another type of game just like this! Man, I can't get enough of this, the artstyle and everything is beyond perfection. Good luck devs!

a good game to play in this genre . but unfortunately , the number of levels is really low ( 7 main levels , with 4 difficulty levels ) , and it becomes a repetitious game soon . overall , I enjoyed it .

Fun game to pass the time. I've been playing for about a month now. I did buy the two "upgrades" after that I can play as much as I like an haven't had to pay for anything else, an no ads. They do have stars for sale, but haven't had to buy any. Overall a really good game for a few bucks. Well worth it IMO.

My old favorite game from PDA times ;) Excellent Android re-issue. A perfect balance between making you spend money on accessories and leaving you cope - you can buy accessories, but you can actually do without them. You are not pushed to spend money, but when you are ready for it, prices are quite low. A great experience. It has made several hours of traveling fun for me.

I am loooong time fan of this game as well as its successor. Been playing for couple years now. One important thing that needs addressing is how the plane sits under the finger. It should be put slightly more forward because it's never good visible and that is an issue when you play on highest difficulty when a small millimeter can decide about your plane.

This is the best shooting game on mobile, the graphics, control and the gameplay are fantastic, sometimes it lags specially when i'm connected on the internet, i also bought the remove ad but sometimes the watch ad for free gift is still there, I think there is a bug, please fix it, i will surely make another purchase on this game maybe the star doubler or the plane generator, please continue to improve this game, 👍👍👍

Pretty amazing shooter with polished graphics and captivating gameplay. Once you start playing you just can't put your phone down. Only thing that doesn't look good on my phone is that the game is not compatible with my Xperia screen ratio so it's not really full screen. Still 5★ well deserved 👍🏻

One of the best action-packed and repayable SHMUP games ever. Easy to play, challenging to master, it's packed with plenty of gameplay features. I've been playing this for nearly a decade on Android and PC. It's that good. I keeps getting updated and is worthy of perpetual appreciation.

Way better than reloaded in most aspects, it's not as grindy and punishing but still has a grindy aspect to it, plenty of interesting enemies and upgrades to discover and unlock, a ton of replayability thanks to stage challenges and difficulties. The game doesn't seem too grindy if you play it on and off. Beautiful graphics, fun gameplay, and interesting bosses with a good challenge. Really fun bullet hell game. Would definitely recommend.

Hands down best game, can be played offline. NOT one of the toilet games you play for a few minutes then need to by energy refills or wait 18 hours to continue playing. For a free game it contains very minimal in-app purchases, and isn't pushing you to spend money to enjoy the game. 10/10 - 7 years later still a fan.

awesome 80s arcade style space shooter! it's a mix of Galaga arcade, Truxton, Choplifter & a bunch of other 80s arcade, Sega Genesis, and Super Nintendo games of the 1990s. but on top of that, the controls are great, the upgrades are all awesome and fun to collect. replayability is off the charts. works liquid smooth on even older phones like the Note3 and Galaxy S3. but really looks amazing on the Galaxy S10 Plus! Nice music and sound effects. amazing graphics and animations. huge end bosses.

I love this game and reloaded ! Been playing reloaded for about 4 or 5 years , can't get enough of it when I start playing . It's made in such a way that you can't get bored of it , upgrading the abilities of the ship is the part that makes me want to play more . But obviously I can't play 24/7 with having a bizzy life . It's one of my top 5 games of all time on android.
